title: Doff Tomato Feed Concentrate – 1L Liquid Vegetable Plant Food for Healthy Growth of Tomatoes, Vegetables & Flowers – Seaweed Enriched – Encourages Root Development – Makes 300L Feed
features: VERSATILE PLANT NUTRITION – Boost the health of tomatoes, courgettes, aubergines and flowering plants with Doff Tomato Feed Concentrate. Enriched with NPK 4-2-10, seaweed and magnesium, this fast-acting tomato fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants in outdoor gardens and indoor houseplant

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Rich in nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, this plant food strengthens roots, enhances flowering, and supports the growth of juicy, flavourful tomatoes. Dilute 1 capful into 4.5L of water and apply tomato feed liquid to the base of the plant, feeding every 4-7 days

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This tomato feed for plants is conveniently supplied with an integral measure for precise dilution every time. Whether feeding tomatoes in beds or other plants in containers, Doff’s tomato plant food saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality vegetable feed provides consistent nutrition for thriving plants. Ideal for indoor and outdoor plants, a 1-litre bottle dilutes into 300 litres of nutrient-rich feed to support healthy growth and fruiting. Available in 500ml, 1L and 2.5L sizes

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
